text: A musical term of unknown meaning, rendered here in the Latin as ‘secret things’.
Another obscure musical term, rendered here in the Latin, ‘for the octave’.
Possibly in connexion with the singing, but it may be the ‘burden’ was the carrying of the ark (cf. Num. 4.15). The Latin has ‘was in charge of the prophecy, as precentor’.
Some think the last twelve words of this verse have been inserted through a copyist’s error.
